summary: Trade attribution wiring complete. Entry, exit, and resolution code paths now populate attribution fields. Backfill script improved for comprehensive reconstruction of existing trades.

entry_wiring.triggers: When open_position returns a filled trade after insert_open_trade
captures: actual_fill_px: trade.actual_fill_px from paper_exec fill engine
entry_wiring.output: TradeAttribution JSONL + update_trade_attribution DB call with attribution_version=1

exit_wiring.triggers: When check_exit returns should_close=true before market resolution
captures: exit_reason: from check_exit (TP, SL, gap_stop, near_resolution, time_exit, etc.)
hold_seconds: time from entry to exit
exit_wiring.note: exit_model_prob left NULL (no directional confidence at exit); trade_class deferred to resolution handler

resolution_wiring.triggers: When market resolves on Polymarket (resolved_markets loaded from runtime/resolved_markets.json)
captures: resolved_winner: YES or NO based on resolution
model_side_was_right: bool indicating if model prediction matched outcome
hold_seconds: computed from entry_ts to resolution_ts

logic: Idempotent: only processes trades with NULL attribution fields
Reconstructs entry_model_prob from trade_forensics.jsonl confidence field
Infers resolved_winner and model_side_was_right from exit_px near 0/1
Sets attribution_version=1 if 5+ fields reconstructed, else 0

next_steps: Run backfill script to reconstruct attribution for existing trades: python -m tools.backfill_attribution
Validate trade_class distribution in next dashboard query
Optional: enhance exit_model_prob capture if directional confidence available at exit time
